title: Polish Pancake Stack with Pea Filling
description: A traditional polish pancake stack filled with a tangy pea mixture, perfect for a weekend brunch.
instructions: 1. In a medium pan, heat 1 tbsp butter over medium heat.
2. Add diced onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
3. Add minced garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
4. Stir in thawed peas and cook until heated through.
5. Meanwhile, warm pancakes according to package instructions.
6. Assemble the stack by placing a pancake on a plate, topping with a spoonful of pea mixture, and repeating.
7. Drizzle with melted butter and sprinkle with a pinch of salt.
8. Serve with a dollop of sour cream, if desired.
